source_pr.title: util/filesort: sort rows using file sort.
source_pr.body:
This PR is for issue [2283](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/2283).

Used by `SortExec` in `executor/executor.go`.

It is necessary when the input rows exceed the predefined memory capacity.

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: The evidence points to time-based randomness in the test (`rand.NewSource(time.Now().UnixNano())`), but this PR is primarily a feature/implementation change (util/filesort) rather than a targeted stabilization fix. Without a concrete flaky signature or a specific stabilization change in the patch, we conservatively mark it as insufficient_evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
